case_title: DAVID C. BASADA VS. PABLO GRAVADOR

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BASADA, DAVID C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRAVADOR, PABLO $1,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $76.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,676.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
